summary: iter231 Echo Voice Chat + EchoMiniButton testing complete. 12/12 backend tests passed. All new features verified: POST /api/echo-voice/chat returns valid JSON with session_id/speech/panel/panel_args/explanation/graph_spec/actions, session continuity works (follow-up messages maintain context), Claude references real outlet P&L data from injected snapshot. Frontend: Dark-blue Echo Mini Button at bottom-right (replaces gold pill), short tap opens quick-launch sheet with Activity/Dashboard/P&L tiles + 6 desktop module links, long-press (>550ms) opens voice panel directly, voice panel has 4 suggestion buttons + mic button, tabbar spacer exists.

issues: Echo command palette overlay (echo-cmd-launcher) appears on page load and intercepts clicks on Echo Mini Button - requires Escape key or JS hide to dismiss. This is a pre-existing issue from previous iterations.

critical_code_review_comments: P&L view shows 'No P&L data for outlet-main/2026-03' when outlet-main is selected - this is expected behavior as data is seeded for outlet-windows. Consider adding a default outlet selection or seeding data for outlet-main.
test_credentials: X-User-Id: chef-william for backend writes. devAuth=1 query param for frontend auth bypass.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing outlet-windows P&L data for voice chat context testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter231 Echo Voice Chat fully tested. Backend: POST /api/echo-voice/chat works with Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations, returns valid JSON with session_id (vs-*), speech (non-empty), panel (nullable), panel_args (dict), explanation (nullable), graph_spec (nullable), actions (list). Session continuity works - follow-up messages with same session_id maintain conversation context. GET /api/echo-voice/session/{session_id} returns full transcript with alternating user/echo roles. Claude receives grounded data snapshot with outlet P&L numbers (food cost %, labor %, prime cost %, top GL expenses, pending accruals, flagged invoices). Frontend: EchoMiniButton at bottom-right (data-testid='echo-mini-btn') replaces gold EchoFab pill. Short tap opens quick-launch sheet (data-testid='echo-quick-sheet') with ASK ECHO section (voice trigger), THIS OUTLET section (Activity/Dashboard/P&L tiles), DESKTOP MODULES section (6 links with correct hrefs). Long-press (>550ms) opens voice panel directly. Voice panel (data-testid='echo-voice-panel') has 4 suggestion buttons (data-testid='voice-suggestion-*') and mic button (data-testid='echo-voice-mic'). Tabbar spacer (data-testid='ecw-tabbar-spacer') exists at 130px width.

frontend: No gold EchoFab pill (correctly removed) - PASS
Quick launch sheet opens on short tap - PASS
Desktop module links (6/6 with correct hrefs) - PASS
P&L view loads (shows no data for outlet-main, expected) - PASS
Long-press (700ms) opens voice panel directly - PASS
